'type' => 'string', 'max' => 63, 'min' => 3, 'pattern' => '[0-9a-z]+[0-9a-z\\.\\-]*[0-9a-z]+', ], 'ServiceQuotaExceededException' => [ 'type' => 'structure', 'required' => [ 'message', ], 'members' =>
